---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# Not an isolated event

- Having the .fcs files for before and after for last several years, retrospectively back-checking

- While not same extent, identified other likely damaged QC events.

- For each of these, simulation experiments suggest would have impacted the unmixing, and users would have been left perplexed what went wrong. 

- Working on ways to preemptively flag these days before additional efforts are lost.
